description: This MCP exposes the recommendation and GAT part of the backend. It turns a person's description and evolving profile context into feature vectors, compares people for compatibility, updates learned feature signals over time, and uses the graph-based recommendation engine to return the best friendship matches.

tools.name: elders_collection
tools.description: Lists all recommendation profiles stored in the GAT system.

tools.name: create_elder_profile
tools.description: Creates a recommendation profile from a description and optional manual overrides. This is where text first becomes vectors.

tools.name: profile_detail
tools.description: Fetches one recommendation profile with its current vectors, confidence, and extracted trait state.

tools.name: update_profile
tools.description: Updates a recommendation profile's human-facing fields. If linked to a real user, this flows through the canonical user profile and then resyncs the GAT state.

tools.name: patch_profile
tools.description: Partially updates recommendation profile data and resyncs feature extraction when needed.

tools.name: update_features
tools.description: Applies long-term behavioral signals to the user's learned feature vector without replacing the whole description.

tools.name: compare_users
tools.description: Compares two people or two descriptions for compatibility and returns why they match or where they may clash.

tools.name: find_friends
tools.description: Runs the GAT-based friend recommendation flow for one profile and returns the best matching people.

tools.name: train_model
tools.description: Retrains the graph recommendation model from the current profiles and social edges.

tools.name: health_status
tools.description: Checks if the recommendation engine and saved model checkpoint are available.

tools.name: feature_schema
tools.description: Returns the list of features and groups that define the recommendation personality model.
